args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `Factory`, `createFactory`, `createMiddleware`, `CreateHandlersInterface`
- Reads as: TypeScript definitions for handler factories with overloads for 1-10 handlers
- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/types.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper that creates Hono apps and combines multiple handlers with type-safe overloads

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `matchedRoutes`, `routePath`, `baseRoutePath`, `basePath`
- Reads as: Functions that extract route info from Context and use caching via WeakMap
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/types.ts, src/utils/url.ts
- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities that return matched routes and path information for a request

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `defineWebSocketHelper`, `WSContext`, `WSEvents`, `UpgradeWebSocket`
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade helper with event listeners and WSContext class for control
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/types.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper enabling websocket events (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError)

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `getCookie`, `getSignedCookie`, `setCookie`, `setSignedCookie`, `deleteCookie`, `generateCookie`
- Reads as: Cookie utilities that parse/serialize cookies with support for signed cookies and prefixes
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts, src/utils/cookie.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie helpers for reading, writing, and deleting cookies including signed variants

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `testClient`
- Reads as: Testing utility that creates a client with custom fetch for Hono apps
- Neighbor files: src/client.ts, src/context.ts, src/hono.ts, src/types.ts
- Safe summary: Testing helper that creates a test client for Hono applications with custom fetch

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `env`, `getRuntimeKey`, `checkUserAgentEquals`, `knownUserAgents`, `Runtime` type
- Reads as: Runtime detection utilities that identify the execution environment (Node, Deno, Bun, etc.)
- Neighbor files: src/context.ts
- Safe summary: Adapter helper for environment runtime detection across Node, Deno, Bun, and edge runtimes

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `css`, `cx`, `keyframes`, `viewTransition`, `Style`, `createCssContext`
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS helper with context-based styling, exports from src/helper/css/common.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS helper providing css() and cx() functions with class name generation

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: `cssCommon`, `cxCommon`, `keyframesCommon`, `viewTransitionCommon`, `rawCssString`, `toHash`
- Reads as: Shared CSS utility functions with symbol-based property access and hash generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts
- Safe summary: Common CSS helper utilities for building styles, class names, and keyframes

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `proxy`
- Reads as: Proxy fetch wrapper that forwards requests with hop-by-hop header cleanup
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy helper that forwards requests while removing hop-by-hop headers per RFC 2616/9110

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `inspectRoutes`, `showRoutes`, `getRouterName`
- Reads as: Dev utilities that inspect and display registered routes in the Hono app
- Neighbor files: src/hono.ts, src/types.ts, src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
- Safe summary: Dev helper that shows registered routes with optional verbose mode and color

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `html`, `raw`
- Reads as: HTML string builder that escapes content and handles callbacks for promises
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
- Safe summary: Helper for building HTML with auto-escaping and callback support for async values

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `toSSG`, `ssgParams`, `disableSSG`, `onlySSG`, `redirectPlugin`
- Reads as: Static site generation helper exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG helper for static site generation with middleware for disabling/conditional rendering

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: `toSSG`, `fetchRoutesContent`, `saveContentToFile`, `defaultPlugin`
- Reads as: Core SSG logic that fetches routes, generates files, and handles plugins/hooks
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: Main SSG implementation with concurrent fetching, file writing, and extension mapping

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: `dirname`, `joinPaths`, `isDynamicRoute`, `filterStaticGenerateRoutes`, `ensureWithinOutDir`
- Reads as: Path utilities for SSG including path joining, dynamic route detection, and security checks
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation and static route filtering

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: `ssgParams`, `isSSGContext`, `disableSSG`, `onlySSG`, `SSGContext`, `SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE`
- Reads as: Middleware for SSG context management with dynamic route param handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware for adding route parameters and controlling static generation in dynamic routes

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `stream`, `streamSSE`, `streamText`, `SSEStreamingApi`
- Reads as: Streaming exports from stream.ts, sse.ts, and text.ts files
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exporting stream, SSE, and text streaming utilities

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: `stream`, `StreamingApi`, `contextStash`
- Reads as: Base streaming implementation with TransformStream and context holding for Bun compatibility
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/utils/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Core streaming helper that returns Response with streaming body and supports error handling

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: `streamSSE`, `SSEStreamingApi`, `SSEMessage`
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming with proper headers and message formatting
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper that writes Server-Sent Events with event/id/data/retry support

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: `streamText`
- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper that sets content-type headers and delegates to stream()
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper that sets appropriate headers for text/plain content with nosniff

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `accepts`
- Reads as: Re-exports the accepts function from accepts.ts for matching accept headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper index that exports the accepts utility for header matching

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: `accepts`, `defaultMatch`, `Accept`, `acceptsConfig`, `acceptsOptions`
- Reads as: Accept header matching utility that parses and selects from supported types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/utils/headers.ts, src/utils/accept.ts
- Safe summary: Accept header matching that returns the best supported type with quality value sorting

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: `ConnInfo`, `NetAddrInfo`, `AddressType`, `GetConnInfo`
- Reads as: Type exports for connection information types including remote address
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper that exports connection info types for remote address access

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: `ConnInfo`, `GetConnInfo`, `NetAddrInfo`, `AddressType`
- Reads as: Type definitions for HTTP connection information with remote address/port details
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/context.ts
- Safe summary: Connection info types defining remote address, port, transport protocol, and address type
